stories.title: Add ImageEdit Protocol + adapter .edit() method (reality-fixed)
acceptanceCriteria: services/providers/base.py exports ImageEditResponse dataclass (image: bytes, model: str, raw: dict, task_id: str | None) AND runtime_checkable ImageEdit Protocol with method edit(*, image: bytes, mask: bytes, prompt: str, size: str = '1024x1024', **kwargs) -> ImageEditResponse, both added to __all__

OpenAICompatibleAdapter gains an edit() method that POSTs multipart to {base_url}/images/edits (NOTE: not /v1/images/edits; base_url already includes /v1) with fields image, mask, prompt, size; supports the same sync + async-task polling pattern as generate(); records cost via record_cost with role=self.role

Note: registry.REQUIRED_ROLES already contains 'image_edit' (line 74 of services/providers/registry.py) — no registry changes needed. Configurable via config.yaml.example which already declares the image_edit block.

tests/providers/test_image_edit_protocol.py verifies: (a) isinstance(OpenAICompatibleAdapter(...), ImageEdit) is True, (b) edit() with a mocked httpx response returns ImageEditResponse with the decoded bytes, (c) cost is recorded with role='image_edit'

stories.title: Migration 0002 — extend image_edits with op_type + payload_json (reality-fixed)
acceptanceCriteria: infra/migrations/0002_image_edits_extend.sql is purely additive: ALTER TABLE image_edits ADD COLUMN op_type TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'inpaint' CHECK (op_type IN ('inpaint','revert')); ADD COLUMN payload_json JSONB; plus CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS image_edits_op_type_idx ON image_edits(op_type)

Smoke test parses the SQL file and asserts (a) it contains ONLY ADD COLUMN / CREATE INDEX statements (no DROP, no UPDATE), (b) the file ends with a newline, (c) column DEFAULT 'inpaint' is present so existing rows remain valid
Existing pytest suite unchanged (zero regressions in tests/scripts/)

stories.title: services/editor package — OCR + inpaint + composite
stories.sessionNote: Scoped-down: scaffold + FakeImageEdit/FakeOCR + test_inpaint_round_trip. Heavy items deferred — see progress.txt 'Deferred to next session'.
acceptanceCriteria: services/editor/ocr.py exposes detect_text_boxes(image_bytes: bytes) -> list[TextBox] using a lazy-init PaddleOCR(lang='ch') module-level singleton; TextBox has x, y, w, h, text, confidence
services/editor/inpaint_text.py exposes inpaint_region(image_bytes, mask_box, new_text, registry) -> bytes which builds the mask PNG, composes prompt, and delegates to registry.image_edit.edit(...)
services/editor/composite.py exposes composite_to_minio(kit_id, image_id, edited_bytes, minio_client) -> None writing to kits/{kit_id}/edited/{image_id}.png; idempotent (overwrite)
tests/editor/conftest.py defines FakeImageEdit (deterministic Pillow overlay on mask bbox) + FakeOCR (returns fixture boxes); reuses _set_fake_provider_env_vars from tests/imagegen/conftest.py
scripts/seed_editor_fixtures.py is idempotent and generates 10 deterministic zh-text PNG fixtures + ground-truth box JSON under tests/editor/fixtures/
tests/editor/test_ocr_accuracy.py passes AC#2: ratio = sum(IoU>=0.5 detected) / sum(ground_truth) >= 0.90
tests/editor/test_inpaint_round_trip.py passes AC#4: elapsed < 20s using FakeImageEdit with a 1.5s budgeted sleep
tests/editor/test_minio_sidecar.py passes AC#8: HEAD kits/.../edited/{id}.png exists after inpaint, absent after revert
tests/editor/test_scripted_edit_session.py passes AC#1: 3 ops + undo + redo, total elapsed <= 90s
make seed-fixtures includes seed-editor-fixtures

stories.title: FastAPI routes — OCR + edit + SSE
acceptanceCriteria: POST /api/images/{id}/ocr returns {boxes:[{x,y,w,h,text,confidence}], engine, version}; cached per image_id (second call invokes engine zero times)
POST /api/images/{id}/edit accepts {mask_box, new_text}, returns 202 + {job_id} and spawns the inpaint task
GET /api/images/{id}/edit/events streams SSE events: progress, success, error, aborted; on client disconnect mid-stream, server abandons the image_edit call and inserts NO image_edits row (AC#7)
Router is registered in apps/api/main.py and discoverable by pnpm gen:api (3 new paths)
tests/editor/test_ocr_route.py passes AC#9 (deterministic + cached)
tests/editor/test_edit_sse_route.py passes AC#7 (client-disconnect zero rows)

stories.title: Frontend deps + nav + i18n + types
acceptanceCriteria: apps/web/package.json declares fabric ^6.0.0; pnpm install resolves cleanly
apps/web/lib/nav.ts sets editor.enabled = true and removes comingInEpic: 5
messages/{zh,en}.json contain editor.tools.{select,text,move,inpaint,undo,redo}, editor.history.{empty,cap}, editor.inpaint.{streaming,error,aborted,cancel}, editor.ocr.{loading,error}
pnpm gen:api includes the 3 new /api/images/{id}/* paths (total 15)

stories.title: CanvasStage with StrictMode-safe fabric lifecycle (R7)
acceptanceCriteria: CanvasStage is a Client Component; consumers import it via next/dynamic with ssr: false
useEffect uses a useRef<boolean> mount guard so StrictMode double-mount creates exactly one fabric.Canvas; cleanup calls fab.dispose() and resets the guard
Fabric event handlers (object:moving, object:scaling) are imperative — NO setState during drag; mouse:up commits a single snapshot to the command stack
command-stack.ts exposes a Zustand store (or equivalent) with undoStack/redoStack, capped at 50 (FIFO eviction), push/undo/redo/clear actions
Vitest canvas-stage-strict-mode.test.tsx asserts: render in <StrictMode>, fabric.Canvas constructor called exactly 1 time, dispose called exactly 1 time on unmount (AC#6)

stories.title: TextLayerOverlay + OCR hook
acceptanceCriteria: use-ocr.ts wraps POST /api/images/{id}/ocr in TanStack Query with stable cache key per image_id
TextLayerOverlay renders SVG boxes positioned over OCR coords; click selects corresponding fabric.Text layer via canvas ref; hover shows tooltip with original detected string

stories.title: ToolRail with 6 buttons + per-button states (R8)
acceptanceCriteria: ToolRail renders exactly 6 buttons: Select / Text-edit / Move / Inpaint / Undo / Redo, each with data-state attribute reflecting idle | active | disabled | loading
Keyboard shortcuts V/T/M/I/Ctrl+Z/Ctrl+Shift+Z toggle active state; ignored when an editable field has focus
use-inpaint.ts opens SSE stream via EventSource (or fetch+ReadableStream with AbortController); returns {status, abort, lastEvent}; calling abort() closes the stream
While status === 'streaming', Inpaint button shows spinner, click triggers abort; all 5 sibling buttons set to disabled (data-state='disabled')
Tooltips via shadcn Tooltip; labels read from messages/{zh,en}.json

stories.title: HistoryTimeline
acceptanceCriteria: Subscribes to command-stack store; renders horizontal thumb strip with op_type label + timestamp
Capped at 50; FIFO eviction visible (oldest scrolls off left side)
Click-to-jump invokes store.jumpTo(index) which restores fabric.loadFromJSON(snapshot)

stories.title: Editor route + EditorRoot composition
acceptanceCriteria: Server Component page.tsx pre-fetches GET /api/images/{id} + ensures OCR cache exists; passes initial data to <EditorRoot>
EditorRoot is a Client Component that lays out 4 regions (CanvasStage + TextLayerOverlay + ToolRail + HistoryTimeline) per design-brief.md screen 5
Dynamic import of CanvasStage with ssr: false and skeleton fallback
pnpm build produces 9 routes total (8 prior + /editor/[image_id] × 2 locales = +2; manifest shows 10 entries OR 9 depending on locale group)

stories.title: Playwright e2e + visual baseline
acceptanceCriteria: editor-canvas-only.spec.ts: text-edit op triggers zero network requests and completes in <300ms (AC#3)
editor-history.spec.ts: 12 alternating ops produce 12 timeline entries; undo-to-zero restores blank canvas (AC#5)
editor-inpaint-cancel.spec.ts: click-during-streaming aborts SSE, db row count remains 0 (AC#7)
editor-toolrail-keyboard.spec.ts: V/T/M/I/Ctrl+Z/Ctrl+Shift+Z each toggle expected data-state (AC#10)
editor-visual.spec.ts: full-page snapshot of /[locale]/editor/[image_id] with seeded image, maxDiffPixelRatio 0.03, no mask; baseline committed
pnpm exec playwright test --list shows 64-66 tests (58 prior + 6-8 new)

stories.title: All gates green
acceptanceCriteria: pnpm typecheck → clean
pnpm lint → clean (no new biome errors)
pnpm build → success, manifest shows /editor/[image_id] route
pnpm check:tokens → no drift
pnpm gen:api → includes 3 new editor paths (total 15)
uv run pytest -q → ~345 passed (326 prior + ~19 EPIC-5)
pnpm exec playwright test --list → 64-66 tests
bash scripts/grep_providers.sh → clean (no vendor brand leak)
EPIC-6/7 visual baselines unchanged (no regression in dashboard/kits/providers/onboarding snapshots)
